description:
Navigate to Contact Page When Clicking 'Book Appointment' Button

Fix the 'Book Appointment' (umów wizytę) button navigation to direct users to the Contact page instead of the Gallery page.

Requirements:
- Locate the 'Book Appointment' button/link in the application
- Update the navigation target from Gallery page to Contact page
- Verify the button exists in all locations where it appears (header, footer, landing page, etc.)
- Test the navigation flow to ensure users land on the correct Contact page
- Confirm the Contact page loads properly and displays relevant booking/contact information
- Check for any related links or calls-to-action that may have the same incorrect routing
title: Fix Book Appointment button navigation to Contact page
